Bus Timings

F23A Bus Schedule Stadium Bus Station to Al Nahda 1, Terminus

December 1, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F23A provides a vital link in Dubai’s public transportation system, connecting the Stadium Bus Station · 9 with Al Nahda 1, Terminus. This bus service is designed to offer efficient and reliable transit options for both residents and visitors traveling between these key locations. With frequent departures throughout the day, Bus F23A caters to various travel needs, from daily commutes to leisure trips.

Route Name F23A
Route Description Stadium Bus Station · 9 Al Nahda 1, Terminus
Total Distance Approximately 10 km
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-40 minutes
Operational Hours 24/7 (Daily)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F23A

Bus F23A Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F23A operates with the following schedule:

From Stadium Bus Station From Al Nahda 1, Terminus

Bus F23A Timetable## Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus F23A is set at AED 5. It ensures access to key destinations and amenities, enhancing convenience and value for money.

Bus Route

The Bus F23A route covers several notable stops, ensuring convenient access to various local landmarks and facilities. The route includes:

  1. Stadium Bus Station · 9

  2. Al Maaref Private School

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. NMC Hospital

  2. Al Nahda 1, Terminus

Bus F23A Station Overview

Stadium Bus Station · 9

Stadium Bus Station · 9 is a vital transit hub strategically positioned near major sports facilities and venues. It offers essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule updates.

Its proximity to stadiums and sports centers makes it a convenient stop for fans and event attendees, ensuring smooth transportation to and from these high-traffic areas. The station’s well-organized facilities support efficient travel and enhance the overall experience for passengers heading to various sporting events.

Al Nahda 1, Terminus

Al Nahda 1, Terminus is a key bus station situated in the Al Nahda 1 area, serving as a central transit point for residents and commuters.

It offers amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a smooth travel experience. Its strategic location in a busy commercial and residential area provides easy access to local shops, services, and nearby neighborhoods. By facilitating seamless connections between various routes, the terminus plays a crucial role in efficient transportation within and beyond the Al Nahda area, making it a vital hub for commuters across Dubai.

Journey Experience

A trip on the F23A bus route from Stadium Bus Station to Al Nahda 1, Terminus takes passengers on a long but scenic journey through bustling parts of Dubai.

Along the way, you’ll pass by educational institutions, shopping centers, and local parks, making it a convenient option for both daily commuters and visitors.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 1, 2025.
